raw_consumer_statement: Two purchases were made on different dates, one was a refrigerator for {$1600.00} for interest free for 18months and another two months later for 12 months. Both were being paid for separately on different bank cards. The {$1600.00} balance is overpaid by at least {$200.00} dollars and the Second purchase is showing that nothing was paid on it. As of XXXX of this year they stated that the two were combined, which it was not done by my wife or myself. now we have a balance of over {$600.00} that they want us to pay interest that will end up being more in less than 24 hours, after we waited the 5-7 days that they said that we would get back to us on after being escalated to a different department, which wasn't done. When I asked why I haven't heard from them they dodged the question and I got nothing resolved.
